    People also ask
    Where is Zenith Waterfall located?
    Zenith Waterfall in the industrial city of Khopoli in the state of Maharashtra is a picturesque monsoon seasonal waterfall that comes to life with every monsoon season.

    Finding Paradise: The Hike to Zenith Waterfall

    Is Zenith Waterfall safe to visit?
    Hi Guys, This is an amazing place very close to Mumbai, may be 2.5 to 3 hr drive...you may visit the place with your family...its safe and joyful, slight adventurous and small trek will take you to the main waterfall, however you may see many other waterfall in the surrounding hill...its very beautiful.

    Zenith Waterfalls, Khopoli, Maharashtra | Panvel | Ring ...


    YouTube · Gautam Khetwal
    3.4L+ views · 8 years ago
    YouTube · Gautam Khetwal
    3.4L+ views · 8 years ago
    10:13
    A beautiful waterfall lying at the foothills of Behran Plateau. Zenith waterfall lies in Khopoli region near Lonavala Khandala.
    9 key moments9 key moments in this video
    From 00:06
    Zenith Falls are located in Khopoli region which are seasonal and can be seen only in monsoon.
    From 00:29
    A short trek of 10 mins will take you to the base of Zenith Waterfalls.
    From 01:22
    Base of Zenith Waterfalls is quite dense with vegetation
    From 01:45
    Zenith Falls is multi stage waterfall where in the last stage is main at height of appx 100m.
    From 02:21
    Zenith Falls is a type of plunge type waterfall.
    From 03:37
    A Datta temple is located just aside the river
    From 03:48
    A beautiful banyan tree with its unique branches
    From 06:15
    Jungles are very remote and dense.
    From 10:05
    Zenith Waterfalls (Khopoli Maharashtra)
    Gautam Khetwal
    YouTube·
